mapper.select: SELECT * FROM action_library WHERE action_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT * FROM action_library WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND (scope = 'SYSTEM' OR (scope = #{scope} AND user_id = #{userId}))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO action_library (scope, user_id, action_name, description, suitable_for, image_urls, video_url, status) VALUES (#{scope}, #{userId}, #{actionName}, #{description}, #{suitableFor}, #{imageUrls}, #{videoUrl}, #{status})
